song.title: Fall Afresh
song.lyrics:
[V1] . A D A D 1) Awaken my soul, come awake . A D F#m To hunger, to seek, to thirst . A D A D Awaken first love, come awake . A D F#m D And do as You did at first
[C] Chorus . A D A Spirit of the Living God . E F#m Come fall afresh on me . D A E/G# Come wake me from my sleep . F#m D A Blow through the caverns of my soul . E F#m D A E A Pour in me to overflow
[V2] . 2) Awaken my soul, come awake . To worship with all your strength . Awaken my soul, come awake . To worship with all your strength
[E] 1) Awaken my soul, come awake To hunger, to seek, to thirst Awaken first love, come awake And do as You did at first Chorus Spirit of the Living God Come fall afresh on me Come wake me from my sleep Blow through the caverns of my soul Pour in me to overflow 2) Awaken my soul, come awake To worship with all your strength Awaken my soul, come awake To worship with all your strength
